log4j:event.log4j:message: Liferay is configured to use Hypersonic as its database. Do NOT use Hypersonic in production. Hypersonic is an embedded database useful for development and demonstration purposes. The database settings can be changed in portal-ext.properties.
Using dialect com.liferay.portal.dao.orm.hibernate.HSQLDialect for HSQL Database Engine 2.7

Liferay automatically starts a child process of Elasticsearch named sidecar for convenient development and demonstration purposes. Do NOT use sidecar in production. Refer to the documentation for details on the limitations of sidecar and instructions on configuring a remote Elasticsearch connection in the Control Panel.
Navigate to Control Panel > System > Gogo Shell and enter "lb" to see all bundles

Files [/opt/liferay/tomcat/lib/ext/postgresql-42.6.0.jar] in /opt/liferay/tomcat/lib/ext are no longer read. Move them to /opt/liferay/tomcat/lib or /opt/liferay/tomcat/webapps/ROOT/WEB-INF/shielded-container-lib/.

HHH000315: Exception executing batch [org.hibernate.StaleStateException: Batch update returned unexpected row count from update [0]; actual row count: 0; expected: 1; statement executed: update OAuthClientASLocalMetadata set mvccVersion=?, modifiedDate=? where oAuthClientASLocalMetadataId=? and mvccVersion=?], SQL: update OAuthClientASLocalMetadata set mvccVersion=?, modifiedDate=? where oAuthClientASLocalMetadataId=? and mvccVersion=?

Liferay is configured to use Hypersonic as its database. Do NOT use Hypersonic in production. Hypersonic is an embedded database useful for development and demonstration purposes. The database settings can be changed in portal-ext.properties.
Using dialect com.liferay.portal.dao.orm.hibernate.HSQLDialect for HSQL Database Engine 2.7

Liferay automatically starts a child process of Elasticsearch named sidecar for convenient development and demonstration purposes. Do NOT use sidecar in production. Refer to the documentation for details on the limitations of sidecar and instructions on configuring a remote Elasticsearch connection in the Control Panel.
Navigate to Control Panel > System > Gogo Shell and enter "lb" to see all bundles

Files [/opt/liferay/tomcat/lib/ext/postgresql-42.6.0.jar] in /opt/liferay/tomcat/lib/ext are no longer read. Move them to /opt/liferay/tomcat/lib or /opt/liferay/tomcat/webapps/ROOT/WEB-INF/shielded-container-lib/.

Available checkers: [AOP Service Registrar System Checker, Spring Extender Unavailable Component System Checker, Declarative Service Soft Circular Dependency System Checker, Declarative Service Unsatisfied Component System Checker, Pending Upgrade System Checker]
Running "AOP Service Registrar System Checker". You can run this by itself with command "aop:failures" in gogo shell.
AOP Service Registrar System Checker check result: No issues were found.
Running "Spring Extender Unavailable Component System Checker". You can run this by itself with command "dm na" in gogo shell.
Spring Extender Unavailable Component System Checker check result: No issues were found.
Running "Declarative Service Soft Circular Dependency System Checker". You can run this by itself with command "ds:softCircularDependency" in gogo shell.
Declarative Service Soft Circular Dependency System Checker check result: No issues were found.
Running "Declarative Service Unsatisfied Component System Checker". You can run this by itself with command "ds:unsatisfied" in gogo shell.
Declarative Service Unsatisfied Component System Checker check result: No issues were found.
Running "Pending Upgrade System Checker". You can run this by itself with command "upgrade:pending" in gogo shell.
Pending Upgrade System Checker check result: No issues were found.

HHH000315: Exception executing batch [java.sql.BatchUpdateException: Batch entry 0 insert into OAuthClientEntry (mvccVersion, companyId, userId, userName, createDate, modifiedDate, authRequestParametersJSON, authServerWellKnownURI, clientId, infoJSON, oidcUserInfoMapperJSON, tokenRequestParametersJSON, oAuthClientEntryId) values (('0'::int8), ('96085999471347'::int8), ('20095'::int8), (NULL), ('2026-03-09 13:29:22.382+00'), ('2026-03-09 13:29:22.382+00'), ('{"scope":"openid profile email","response_type":"code"}'), ('http://host.docker.internal:8088/v1/esignet/oidc/.well-known/openid-configuration'), ('liferay-portal-client'), ('{"grant_types":["authorization_code","refresh_token"],"application_type":"web","client_secret_expires_at":0,"scope":"openid profile email","client_secret":"dummy","client_name":"Client to eSignet","token_endpoint_auth_method":"client_secret_basic","client_id":"liferay-portal-client","response_types":["code"],"id_token_signed_response_alg":"RS256"}'), ('{"address":{"zip":"address->postal_code","country":"address->country","city":"address->locality","addressType":"","street":"address->street_address","region":"address->region"},"phone":{"phoneType":"","phone":"phone_number"},"contact":{"birthdate":"birthdate","gender":"gender"},"users_roles":{"roles":""},"user":{"firstName":"given_name","lastName":"family_name","emailAddress":"email","jobTitle":"","languageId":"locale","middleName":"middle_name","screenName":""}}'), ('{"grant_type":"authorization_code","scope":"openid profile email"}'), ('29809'::int8)) was aborted: ERROR: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "ix_fec415c2" Detail: Key (companyid, authserverwellknownuri, clientid)=(96085999471347, http://host.docker.internal:8088/v1/esignet/oidc/.well-known/openid-configuration, liferay-portal-client) already exists. Call getNextException to see other errors in the batch.], SQL: insert into OAuthClientEntry (mvccVersion, companyId, userId, userName, createDate, modifiedDate, authRequestParametersJSON, authServerWellKnownURI, clientId, infoJSON, oidcUserInfoMapperJSON, tokenRequestParametersJSON, oAuthClientEntryId) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

Batch entry 0 insert into OAuthClientEntry (mvccVersion, companyId, userId, userName, createDate, modifiedDate, authRequestParametersJSON, authServerWellKnownURI, clientId, infoJSON, oidcUserInfoMapperJSON, tokenRequestParametersJSON, oAuthClientEntryId) values (('0'::int8), ('96085999471347'::int8), ('20095'::int8), (NULL), ('2026-03-09 13:29:22.382+00'), ('2026-03-09 13:29:22.382+00'), ('{"scope":"openid profile email","response_type":"code"}'), ('http://host.docker.internal:8088/v1/esignet/oidc/.well-known/openid-configuration'), ('liferay-portal-client'), ('{"grant_types":["authorization_code","refresh_token"],"application_type":"web","client_secret_expires_at":0,"scope":"openid profile email","client_secret":"dummy","client_name":"Client to eSignet","token_endpoint_auth_method":"client_secret_basic","client_id":"liferay-portal-client","response_types":["code"],"id_token_signed_response_alg":"RS256"}'), ('{"address":{"zip":"address->postal_code","country":"address->country","city":"address->locality","addressType":"","street":"address->street_address","region":"address->region"},"phone":{"phoneType":"","phone":"phone_number"},"contact":{"birthdate":"birthdate","gender":"gender"},"users_roles":{"roles":""},"user":{"firstName":"given_name","lastName":"family_name","emailAddress":"email","jobTitle":"","languageId":"locale","middleName":"middle_name","screenName":""}}'), ('{"grant_type":"authorization_code","scope":"openid profile email"}'), ('29809'::int8)) was aborted: ERROR: duplicate key value violates unique constraint "ix_fec415c2" Detail: Key (companyid, authserverwellknownuri, clientid)=(96085999471347, http://host.docker.internal:8088/v1/esignet/oidc/.well-known/openid-configuration, liferay-portal-client) already exists.
